title: Remove authentication gate from Admin page

requirements.text: In frontend/src/pages/AdminPage.tsx, remove the authentication check and any login gate that blocks access to the page. The /admin route must be fully accessible without any login or identity verification — remove any conditional rendering that shows an 'admin access required' or 'please log in' error message, and ensure all booking submissions are fetched and displayed immediately when the page loads without requiring authentication.

quotes: You may need admin access to view booking submissions. Please ensure you are logged in as an admin.

acceptanceCriteria: Navigating to /admin displays booking submissions without any login prompt or error message
No 'admin access required' or 'please log in' message is shown at any point on the Admin page
All stored booking form submissions are fetched and rendered on page load without requiring Internet Identity authentication
The Admin page retains its black and neon green styling

constraints: Do not modify any immutable frontend paths (hooks, main.tsx, ui components)
Do not change the backend query function for fetching submissions
nonGoals: Adding real authentication or role-based access control
Modifying the booking form submission flow
Changing the visual layout or styling of the Admin page beyond removing the error state
